sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36987" key="e)cattiki/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξαττῐκίζω</orth>, <sense id="n36987.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">express in Attic form, Atticize,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1608.tlg001:p.19B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PS</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.19B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
